section_text:
3. UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST
(Conditional Inter-DU Mobility Information)

4. UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE
(Requested Target Cell ID)

3. The gNB-CU sends an UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU to create an UE
context and setup one or more data bearers. The UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message is sent for each
candidate cell and includes a HandoverPreparationInformation (conditional handover) or a CG-ConfigInfo
(conditional PSCell change or subsequent CPAC).

4. The candidate gNB-DU responds to the gNB-CU with an UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message
including the target cell ID that was requested from the gNB-CU. The response message is sent for each
requested candidate cell.
ETSI
[PAGE 36]
3GPP TS 38.401 version 18.6.0 Release 18 35 ETSI TS 138 401 V18.6.0 (2025-07)

messages.name: UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST (Conditional Inter-DU Mobility Information)
UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE (Requested Target Cell ID)

protocol_specs.reason: TS 38.473 defines the F1AP protocol procedures including handover. Section 8.2.1.3 specifically describes the Inter-gNB-DU LTM handover procedure signaling and call flow.

intent: gNB-CU has to prepare and send F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST" message to the candidate gNB-DU and candidate gNB-DU has to respond with F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE" message and this message has to be handled on gNB-CU for Inter-gNB DU LTM Handover Procedure
